name: io.github.AIWerk/mcp-server-vault
description: Bitwarden/Vaultwarden for agents: list tagged items, TOTP codes, one-time Sends, save new secrets.

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Bitwarden region or self-hosted mode (e.g. us, eu, or self-hosted).

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for self-hosted Vaultwarden, scheme+host only (e.g. https://pass.example.com). Omit for Bitwarden cloud.

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_MASTER_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Vault master password, used to unlock and decrypt items.
